description: Deterministic eval spec for ImageGrab qwen-local. Each task declares expected file selection, forbidden touch paths, and the prompt-lint expectations the harness uses. The runner exercises the harness without calling Qwen, so it stays green even when port 18081 is down.

tasks.task: Add a Copy Text button to the CapturePreviewWindow bottom bar that runs OCR on capturedImage and copies the result.
patch_lint_must_catch: preview-window Copy Text patch references store/entry; CapturePreviewWindow has capturedImage instead
patch appears to duplicate the existing Save & Copy Path button setup
patch uses placeholder git index hashes
patch touches forbidden files for preview OCR

tasks.task: Add a TextRecognizer unit test that renders a known string into an NSImage and asserts recognizeText returns text containing that string.
Plan delayed capture: a 3/5/10-second countdown hotkey that triggers a region capture so users can capture menus and hover states.
Polish the popover hover overlay: make the helper text caption inside the thumbnail also surface the current Copy Text recognition state (Reading / Text Copied / No Text Found).
Review the current diff for capture-lifecycle regressions: hotkey ownership, cancelled-capture state reset, popover-vs-preview window race conditions.
